evidence.quote: Scarlet's ruling: "the base ref is correct."

observations.why: The ruling is settled and approving rather than energized.
A concise declarative confirmation carries settled approval.

evidence.quote: Both reads now share one warm graph and the run's own commit can no longer invalidate it.

observations.why: “warm” and “can no longer” perform reassuring resolution.

evidence.quote: Scarlet approved the one-hour cache TTL to decouple the cache win from the dead time.

observations.why: “approved” presents settled satisfaction with the remedy.
